ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "gid_1" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the primary administrative division */,
  "gid_2" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the secondary administrative division */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the region */,
  "admin_level" TEXT /* Administrative level of the region (e.g., state, province, district) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gid_1", "gid_2")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "gid_1" TEXT /* Reference to the primary administrative division */,
  "gid_2" TEXT /* Reference to the secondary administrative division */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "wealth_pooled" REAL /* Wealth distribution metric */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households */,
  "urban_rural" INTEGER /* Indicator of urban or rural setting (1 for urban, 0 for rural) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is employed */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is unemployed */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "education_level" REAL /* Average years of education in the region */,
  "internet_access_rate" REAL /* Percentage of households with internet access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_gid_1 FOREIGN KEY ("gid_1") REFERENCES regions ("gid_1"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_data_gid_2 FOREIGN KEY ("gid_2") REFERENCES regions ("gid_2")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator entry */,
  "gid_1" TEXT /* Reference to the primary administrative division */,
  "gid_2" TEXT /* Reference to the secondary administrative division */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "water_index" REAL /* Water access and quality index */,
  "sanitation_index" REAL /* Sanitation facilities index */,
  "under5_mort" REAL /* Under-five mortality rate */,
  "women_edu" REAL /* Women's education level index */,
  "women_bmi" REAL /* Women's body mass index */,
  "maternal_mortality_rate" REAL /* Maternal mortality rate per 100,000 live births */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated against key diseases */,
  "hiv_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of the population infected with HIV */,
  "malaria_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of the population affected by malaria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_gid_2 FOREIGN KEY ("gid_2") REFERENCES regions ("gid_2"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_gid_1 FOREIGN KEY ("gid_1") REFERENCES regions ("gid_1")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household survey */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the socioeconomic data entry */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used for conducting the survey */,
  "surveyor_name" TEXT /* Name of the person conducting the survey */,
  "surveyor_organization" TEXT /* Organization of the person conducting the survey */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Total income of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_surveys_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "gid_1" TEXT /* Reference to the primary administrative division */,
  "gid_2" TEXT /* Reference to the secondary administrative division */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by age groups */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by gender */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of population by ethnicity */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate (influx minus outflux) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_gid_1 FOREIGN KEY ("gid_1") REFERENCES regions ("gid_1"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_gid_2 FOREIGN KEY ("gid_2") REFERENCES regions ("gid_2")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of geographical coordinates */,
  "gid_1" TEXT /* Reference to the primary administrative division */,
  "gid_2" TEXT /* Reference to the secondary administrative division */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the data collection point */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_coordinates_gid_1 FOREIGN KEY ("gid_1") REFERENCES regions ("gid_1"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_coordinates_gid_2 FOREIGN KEY ("gid_2") REFERENCES regions ("gid_2")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the dataset */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_data ("data_id")
)
